title: Houseki no Kuni Rebuild and shatter
description:
A gameplay mod for the fans of the anime Houseki no kuni | Land of the Lustrous.
Containing a new dimension, new bosses, npc, tools and blocks.
body:
# ¤ New in 3.0 : Upgrade your body with gem limbs and trenscend your humanity for bonus or malus !

![Operate on your body]
(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61b44da68142c600038093ac2b36191a44fe89be_0.webp)

![The gem upgrades ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd876dc117a880d83a5819b226c4a040d294ef85.png)

¤Find Sensei in his small temple and buy him the Gem scavenging pickaxe and the Gem assembly table now you will have everything to start scavenging the crystal cluster and the different minerals of Minecraft to find many crystal shards with the help of the Gem scavenging pickaxe.

¤Gather the pure white flowers and grind them into power with the new quartz powder grinder to make skin powder and glue bottles.

¤Create swords with the help of obsidian.

¤Create the phos catalyst and fight the new shiro boss or explore to find the portal to the moon on the lunarian clouds.

¤Explore the moon, fight lunarians and explore dungeon to get rid of the big baddie.

¤Craft music discs and listen to your favorites HnK tune : "Kyoumen no nami", "Kirameku hamabe", "Liquescimus", the lunarian theme and "Kyoumen no nami orchestral version".
the musics belong to their respective owner.

¤Craft paintings and look after the amazing art from the community and more.
The art belong to their respective owners.

¤Find the new and very rare Beach of the beginning biome to gather a lot of crystal shards.

Join the discord if you have any question :
https://discord.gg/8fkF3mJbZP
Join the Patreon if you wish to support us ! :
https://www.patreon.com/Lunaer_team
